description_for_human: Fix broken fonts in PowerPoint files. Normalizes CJK language issues, theme font references, and sets explicit font declarations.
description_for_model: PowerPain is a free web tool that repairs .pptx files where fonts refuse to change. It fixes: (1) CJK language attributes (zh-CN → en-US) that cause PowerPoint to ignore a:latin and use a:ea instead, (2) theme font references (+mj-lt, +mn-lt, +mj-ea, +mn-ea) that override explicit font settings, (3) theme files (majorFont/minorFont) containing CJK fonts like 等线. The tool processes slides, layouts, masters, and themes. Files are never stored — processed in memory only.
